elements.title: lang::report_page_059_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ue.userid,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_g.timemodified                                        as graduated,
       kbi_cm.added                                              as created,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0)                   AS grade,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN kbi_g_c.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g_c.finalgrade / kbi_g_c.rawgrademax) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g_c.finalgrade END), 0)                 AS grade_course,
       kbi_gi.gradepass,
       kbi_g.rawgrademax,
       kbi_g.finalgrade,
       kbi_cm.completion,
       kbi_cmc.completionstate,
       kbi_m.name                                                AS module_name,
       kbi_gi.itemname,
       kbi_ue.status                                             AS enrol_status,
       kbi_ue.timeend,
       CASE
         WHEN kbi_ue.id > 0 AND kbi_cmc.completionstate IN (1, 2)
                 THEN kbi_cmc.timemodified
         ELSE NULL END                                       AS completed_date
FROM (SELECT MAX(kbi_ue.id) AS id, MIN(kbi_ue.status) AS status, MAX(kbi_ue.timeend) AS timeend, kbi_ue.userid, kbi_e.courseid
      FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue
             JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.id = kbi_ue.enrolid
      GROUP BY kbi_e.courseid, kbi_ue.userid) ue
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_ue.courseid
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_cm.module
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ue.courseid
       JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi_c ON kbi_gi_c.itemtype = 'course' AND kbi_gi_c.courseid = kbi_ue.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.itemtype = 'mod' AND kbi_gi.iteminstance = kbi_cm.instance AND kbi_gi.itemmodule = kbi_m.name
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.userid = kbi_ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g_c ON kbi_g_c.itemid = kbi_gi_c.id AND kbi_g_c.userid = kbi_ue.userid
WHERE kbi_ue.id > 0
  AND kbi_cm.course = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
